native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: SUGAR RING DISTORTION IN THE GLYCOSYL-ENZYME INTERMEDIATE OF A FAMILY G/11 XYLANASE. Entity description: ENDO-1,4-BETA-XYLANASE. Organism: Niallia circulans. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: none. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: no explicit E65 metadata context mark emitted

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: no explicit E65 metadata context mark emitted
